allow: Bash(# Copy all routes, lang files and check for more issues cp d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/shop-tours/routes/web.php d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/Shoptour2/routes/web.php cp d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/shop-tours/routes/api.php d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/Shoptour2/routes/api.php || true cp d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/shop-tours/routes/console.php d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/Shoptour2/routes/console.php || true # Copy lang directory [ -d d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/shop-tours/lang ] && cp -rf d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/shop-tours/lang/. d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/Shoptour2/lang/ # Check routes now cd d:/Claude_Code/Getraenkeshop/Shoptour2 && php artisan route:list 2>&1)
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo DB::table\(''pages''\)->count\(\); echo '' pages exist'';")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name ''php'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like ''*artisan*'' -or $_.CommandLine -like ''*serve*'' } | Format-Table Id, CPU, StartTime -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, StartTime, Path -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 18360, 107868, 125348 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ''Old PHP processes stopped''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, StartTime -AutoSize")
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo App\\Models\\Pricing\\TaxRate::count\(\) . '' tax rates'';")
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo DB::select\(''SELECT count\(*\) as c FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=""table"" AND name=""sessions""''\)[0]->c;")
Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="echo DB::table\(''sessions''\)->count\(\) . '' sessions in DB'';")
